SELECT hex(data) FROM test_blob WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT hex(test_blob.data) || additional_data.info FROM test_blob, additional_data;
SELECT hex(data) AS hex_value FROM (SELECT data FROM test_blob ORDER BY data LIMIT 1) AS subquery;
SELECT hex(test_blob.data) FROM test_blob WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_data WHERE info LIKE 'Example%');
SELECT t1.hex_value FROM (SELECT hex(data) AS hex_value FROM test_blob) AS t1, additional_data WHERE t1.hex_value LIKE '\%AA%';
WITH temp_blob AS (SELECT hex(data) AS hex_value FROM test_blob) SELECT hex_value FROM temp_blob WHERE hex_value <> '';
